verdict: PASS. All hard checks clear. Word count 1302 is within [1200, 1600]. Reading time at 200 wpm = 6.5 min, within [6, 8]. Primary resource [1] cited multiple times; all three resources cited; bibliography matches inline markers. No forward references taught at depth — ReAct (14.6) and fixed chain/decision matrix (14.7) are bare-name-and-defer mentions only. All sampled assertions (10 of 10) trace to the corpus. Format is clean: no frontmatter, H1 first line, exactly 6 required sections in correct order, sidecar meta present. Beginner readability is strong: every key term bolded and defined at first use, concrete-before-abstract throughout, planning loop steps as numbered list, tools as table, no walls of text, no assessment references. Two soft findings noted, both non-blocking and well below the 3-finding escalation threshold. Reading meets the standard-depth bar.
